rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0001
rows.name:
I am Nagi Kentarou,
commander of NLA's defense forces.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0002
rows.name:
Many of you here served under me back on the
White Whale. You know I'm no good at lying.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0003
rows.name: So I will tell you only the facts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0004
rows.name: This is a state of emergency.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0005
rows.name:
A large force from the alien syndicate known as
Growth is currently approaching NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0006
rows.name:
We know they have Doll-class ground weapons, and
reports confirm unidentified large flying weapons as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0007
rows.name:
They show no sign of responding
to our calls for negotiation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0008
rows.name:
Director General Maurice continues
to pursue dialogue, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0009
rows.name:
As for me, I must proceed with
preparations for armed defense.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0010
rows.name:
That is why I have gathered
all BLADE Unions here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0011
rows.name:
Finding and securing the Life Point
is our top priority mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0012
rows.name: However, NLA is no longer just for us Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0013
rows.name:
It has become the foundation of life for the
Ma-non here and many other alien peoples.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0014
rows.name:
And for the sake of the colonists yet to awaken,
we cannot afford to lose NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0015
rows.name:
Fortunately, the Ma-non have offered their
ship for the evacuation of residents.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0016
rows.name: They have no combat weapons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0017
rows.name: But even so, for NLA's sake,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0018
rows.name:
no... for the sake of us Earthlings, they
promised to lend us their full support.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0019
rows.name: If we do not act here, then who will?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0020
rows.name:
If any of you lose your B.B. in this battle,
I promise we will provide you with a new body.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0021
rows.name: Everyone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0022
rows.name:
I know how harsh this is, but I order you: Protect this
city, even if you must cast aside your current bodies![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08040100_MSG0023
rows.name: I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]
